# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind: Enhanced AI Assistant for Guided DSA Practice
- Summary: Introduces improved AI assistant capabilities to CodeGrind, offering guided problem-solving help, model switching, and a streamlined chat experience within the existing DSA practice platform.
- Slug: new-codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-new-codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-02-new-codegrind-ai-assistant-improvements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now ships an upgraded AI assistant (Azure OpenAI) with multiple model options, improved persistence, and a more capable guidance flow to help users solve LeetCode-style problems faster while keeping the learning experience engaging.
- CTA: Try the updated AI assistant in your next practice session and share feedback to help refine the guidance flow.
- Visual brief: Short demonstration video: UI showing AI chat panel, model switcher, real-time code execution, and solving a sample problem with step-by-step hints. Include subtle CodeGrind branding and cyberpunk UI cues.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
